tagline: A Full Service Commercial and Industrial Landscaping Firm

hero.headline:
Gulf South Properties Deserve
Expert Landscapes
hero.subheadline: Your commercial property makes a first impression every single day. With 43 years of experience and over 100 landscape professionals, Louisiana Landscape Specialty designs, builds, and maintains the most recognized commercial properties across Southeast Louisiana.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Commercial Landscape Services<br class="hidden md:block">That Protect Your Investment
services.subtitle: From routine maintenance to full-scale design and installation, our licensed professionals handle every aspect of your commercial landscape so your property always looks its best.

cards.title: Landscape Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive turf mowing, edging, weed eating, planting bed care, and ongoing property upkeep that keeps your commercial grounds pristine year-round.

cards.title: Irrigation Services
cards.description: Full irrigation system inspections, installation, maintenance, repair, diagnostics, seasonal startup, and winterization to keep every zone performing efficiently.

cards.title: Tree & Shrub Care
cards.description: Expert pruning, trimming, tree removal, and stump grinding by licensed arborists who protect your property's mature plantings and structural integrity.

cards.title: Pest & Disease Management
cards.description: Integrated pest control and disease management programs with targeted fertilization to protect and nourish your landscape investment against Gulf South threats.

cards.title: Design & Installation
cards.description: Professional landscape architecture and installation for commercial properties — from concept drawings to finished hardscapes, plantings, and lighting systems.

cards.title: Seasonal Enhancements
cards.description: Color rotations, mulch and pine straw installations, flower bed redesigns, and property enhancement projects that keep your grounds fresh and inviting.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Premier Commercial Landscape

steps.title: Schedule a Property Assessment
steps.description: Walk us through your property and goals. Our licensed landscape architects will evaluate your grounds and provide a comprehensive, no-obligation proposal within days.

steps.title: We Deploy Our Team
steps.description: Over 100 trained landscape professionals execute your plan on schedule. Licensed contractors, arborists, and irrigation specialists handle every detail across your property.

steps.title: Enjoy Pristine Grounds Year-Round
steps.description: Your commercial property stays immaculate through every season. Consistent crews, proactive maintenance, and responsive service mean you never worry about your landscape again.

about.label: Why Property Managers Choose Us
about.headline: 43 Years Building the Gulf South's Most Recognized Landscapes
about.description: Founded in 1983 by Randy M. Loup, Louisiana Landscape Specialty grew from a small operation with fewer than a dozen employees into one of the largest landscape contracting companies in the Gulf South. Today, over 100 professionals across three Southeast Louisiana locations deliver the same dedication to quality that has built lasting relationships with contractors, developers, and property managers throughout the region.

features.title: Licensed Professionals On Every Job
features.description: Licensed landscape contractors, architects, arborists, and irrigation specialists ensure every project meets the highest industry and regulatory standards.

features.title: Three Locations Across Southeast LA
features.description: With offices in Covington, Gretna, and the greater metro area, our crews respond faster and serve your properties with true regional coverage.

features.title: Long-Term Partnership Approach
features.description: We earn your trust through consistent results, not contracts. Many of our client relationships span decades because we treat every property like our reputation depends on it.

pricing.headline: Transparent Commercial Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every property is unique. We provide detailed proposals tailored to your grounds, scope, and budget — with no hidden fees or unexpected charges.

guarantee.headline: Our "Property Pride" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your grounds don't meet the standard we promised, we will return and correct the issue at no additional cost. With 43 years of reputation on the line, we don't cut corners — we cut grass, trim trees, and deliver landscapes that make your property the best-looking on the block.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start maintaining our property?
faqs.answer: Most new commercial clients are onboarded within one to two weeks. We begin with a thorough property assessment, then deploy a dedicated crew matched to your property's size and needs. For urgent situations, we can often accommodate faster timelines.

faqs.question: Do you handle both small and large commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. From single office buildings to sprawling industrial campuses and HOA communities, our 100+ professionals and three regional locations give us the capacity to handle properties of any scale across the Gulf South.

faqs.question: Are your crews licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold landscape contractor and general contractor licenses in both Louisiana and Mississippi, along with licensed landscape architects, certified arborists, and irrigation licensing. Full liability coverage protects every property we service.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the greater Gulf South region of Southeast Louisiana including Covington, Mandeville, Gretna, Metairie, Baton Rouge, New Orleans, and surrounding communities from our three regional office locations.

faqs.question: Can you handle irrigation and lighting along with landscaping?
faqs.answer: Yes — we are a true full-service firm. Our teams handle irrigation system installation, repair, and seasonal management alongside landscape lighting, pest control, tree care, and every other aspect of commercial grounds management.

testimonials.name: Michael D.
testimonials.text: Steve and his team have your landscaping needs covered. They are fast, professional, and very reasonable. Our property has never looked better since we brought them on board.

testimonials.name: Randy L.
testimonials.text: Our organization has built a solid reputation over the years, establishing trust with clients through a highly skilled team that consistently delivers exceptional commercial landscape services across the Gulf South.

testimonials.name: James P.
testimonials.text: Managing multiple commercial properties requires a landscape partner you can count on every single week. Louisiana Landscape Specialty has been that partner for us year after year — consistent, professional, and always responsive.

contact.headline:
Ready for Grounds That
Impress Every Visitor?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation property assessment from one of the Gulf South's most experienced landscape firms. We respond within 24 hours with a detailed proposal.
